title: NM-4 evidence DB score reconciliation operator proof
problem: Tickets 127–130 proved live Ollama fall-through through contradiction on arbitrary manual_text in the gitignored evidence DB. Score reconciliation is deterministic (no model client) and was only proven on checksum-pinned synthnote mock spines. NM-4 still lacks an operator proof that reconcile-scores writes score_events on the evidence DB after the live spine plus a follow-up manual_text source.
acceptance_criteria: After NM-4 live spine on the gitignored evidence DB, a follow-up manual_text source can be ingested and extracted (live or mock per fixture map), then reconcile-scores produces at least one score_events row.
Relationship confidence updates per domain-pack score_reconciliation overlay (formula_version, stronger_evidence_boost).
claim_supports_relationship matching covers the evidence DB graph (live-drafted edges), not only the golden may_reduce/semantic diversity triple.
Checksum-pinned synthnote mock reconcile path remains deterministic (ticket-099 tests pass).
Golden tests remain mock-only and pass.
No new Ollama flags or model calls in score_reconciler.
non_goals: Ollama or live LLM in score reconciliation.
rollback_plan: Revert evidence DB matcher changes in score_reconciler; retain ticket-127–130 live fall-through.
